title: Cobblemon Vivillon Poke Ball Forms
description: Additional forms for Vivillon in Cobblemon that replicate various Poké Balls.
body:
Cobblemon Vivillon forms based on various Poké Balls. These are obtained by getting the advancement "Aspiring Vivillionaire" and then getting Spewpa to Level 12. A new option will be added to evolve Spewpa into the form that matches the ball it was caught in.

Currently the forms added are:
- Citrine Ball
- Verdant Ball
- Azure Ball
- Roseate Ball
- Slate Ball
- Premier Ball
- Great Ball
- Ultra Ball
- Master Ball

Additional Forms will be added in the future. If you want to play with the official Cobblemon addon Pride Vivillon you will need to download the "Pride Compat" version.
